case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. MELODIE M. MARTINEZ et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-08-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-05-2011 CONTINUED TO FEB-06-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE DEC-05-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION LAURA M. D'ANNA FILED RE: INTEREST CALCULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
DECLARATION LAURA M. D'ANNA FILED RE: CCP 1033(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
DECLARATION BEVERLY B. BOGAN FILED RE: CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, MELODIE M. $3,145.52 PRINCIPAL, $438.61 INTEREST, $294.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,878.13, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-06-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $122.09 INTEREST, $30.79 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, MELODIE M.
CRC 3.740 REVIEW
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-05-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, MELODIE M.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, MELODIE M. DOES 1 THRU 5, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-18-2011
CRC 3.740 REVIEW
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-08-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED MAY-25-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, MELODIE M.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 5, INCL.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,649.43 AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, MELODIE M.
